recent_excerpts: Attackers compromised multiple SAP-related npm packages to deploy credential-stealing malware, targeting SAP BTP and cloud app credentials. Campaign dubbed mini Shai-Hulud.
Elastic Security Labs details a supply chain compromise of the axios npm package that deployed a unified RAT across platforms, impacting an unknown number of downstream…
Elastic Security Labs researcher Joe Desimone built a proof-of-concept tool in an afternoon that detected a supply chain compromise of the Axios HTTP library, affecting npm…
